content.text: Based on what you've already told me, Mira's comfort object is her **blue elephant**, which you noted is used for both naps and travel — no guesswork needed there. that consistent association is actually helpful at 4 months, since familiar scents and textures on a comfort object can act as a sleep cue, signaling to Mira that rest is coming. if you ever want to reinforce it, keeping the elephant part of her existing 19:30 routine (bath → story → lights out) during daytime naps too can help her brain link it even more strongly to settling down.
